# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.

Prevent monitoring misconfiguration.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.enabled=true
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - discovery.seed_hosts=elasticsearch
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=elasticsearch
    ulimits:
      nofile: 65536
    volumes:
      - ./elasticsearch/data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - ./elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml:ro
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx512m
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.enabled=true
      - node.name=logstash
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/etc/logstash/conf.d/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.enabled=true
      - node.name=kibana
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm-agent-java/apm-server:7.10.2
    container_name: apm-server
    environment:
      - server.host=0.0.0.0
      - server.port=8200
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.enabled=true
      - node.name=apm-server
    volumes:
      - ./apm-server/config/apm-server.yml:/usr/share/apm-server/config/apm-server.yml:ro
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

networks:
  elk:
    driver: bridge
